title: [ExportVerilog] Add emitReplicatedOpsToHeader option
body:
As discussed in #2224 and #2583, we have a consensus to create a header 
file to put macros, type definitions and etc. This PR proposes a mechanism 
to create a header at ExportVerilog. 

This commit adds a new lowering option `emitReplicatedOpsToHeader`
to create a header file which stores replicated ops.

Currently, this PR creates `circt_header.svh` under the output
directory and users are expected to manually register the header to their
include paths.

If necessary I'll make the header name configurable from command lines.

Example:
```bash
$ firtool perf/regress/FPU.fir -split-verilog -o out \ 
  -lowering-options="emitReplicatedOpsToHeader" 
 
$ ls out
circt_header.svh
CompareRecFN.sv
DivSqrtRecF64_mulAddZ31.sv
....

$ head circt_header.cvh
// Standard header to adapt well known macros to our needs.
`ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
  `define RANDOMIZE
`endif
...

$ head CompareRecFN.sv
`include "circt_header.svh"
module CompareRecFN(    // ../perf/regress/FPU.fir:2024:10
  input  [64:0] io_a,
```
